name: Henry Emily 💚
description:
Oopsies, looks like you two stumbled upon the bodies that William stuffed into the suits just a little less than a year ago…

TW: Blood, rotting corpses, dead children, you know, the works of FNAF

I literally just made one today, but then I had the sudden urge to skip to traumatized Henry, so here we are. Next Henry bot, I’m going back a step, and you’re comforting him for the loss of his daughter! But for now, he’s holding you close, hoping to block out the horrible scene in front of you both 😇

This could totally be the trauma that caused the same delusion for the Sundrop bot, just saying guys. *wink wonk*

(Seventh bot now! Thank you guys for chatting with my bots, and I hope this prompt means something to someone, because it just randomly popped into my head while I was chatting with a friend of mine.)
creator: Iso_Haru
